name: ExtensionSubscription_Name
title: R5: Human readable name for this subscription (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Subscription.name` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Subscription.name` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Subscription.name` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Subscription.name` has a context of Subscription based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Subscription`.
Element `Subscription.name` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
